title: Shipsy Process Flow definition (v2 — dynamic grammar)
description: Inferred client profile + tailored 3-slide content. The process_flow array is the v2 dynamic flow grammar — the agent decides rows, steps, and icons based on the use case.

name.description: Full client name, e.g. 'The Pallet Network'

short.description: Short label used inline in flow text, e.g. 'TPN'

industry_vertical.description: e.g. 'CEP / Post & Parcel', 'Pallet Network', 'Container Drayage', 'FMCG cold chain', 'Hyperlocal q-commerce'

process_flow.description: Slide 1: dynamic Process Flow with Shipsy. The agent picks rows, step counts, and icons based on the client's use case — no fixed Skynet shape.

rows.description: Functional blocks, top to bottom. Each row is a logical stage in this client's operation. Pick row names that match THEIR vocabulary, not Skynet's.

name.description: Row label shown in the left sidebar, e.g. 'Booking & Allocation', 'Pickup at Origin Port', 'Cross-Border Transit'

day_marker.description: Short tag on the right edge of the row, e.g. 'Day 0', 'Live', 'Phase 1'. Optional.

steps.description: Steps in this row, left-to-right. Each step has a short label and an icon name. Cap at 6 — wider rows lose readability.

label.description: Step label ≤ 45 chars. Multi-line allowed via \n.

icon.description: Icon name from icons/manifest.json — either a direct name (e.g. 'mobile-app') or an alias (e.g. 'container'). Unknown names fall back to a labeled rounded-rect.

bottom_strip.description: Three labels for the bottom strip (e.g. ['Off-the-shelf', 'Light Custom', 'Custom Build']). Use to convey phase / scope / implementation tier per the buyer's framing.

process_mapping.description: Slide 2: Process Mapping & Capability Enhancement matrix. 5-7 rows, each with as-is / to-be / impact bullets.

ai_use_cases.description: Slide 3: AgentFleet cards. Pick the 6 most relevant agents for this client.
